resources.string: Shown while a FlashBang alarm is ringing. Sound is played by the alarm itself, not this notification.
Answer your flashcard to stop the alarm
Couldn\'t load your card — dismiss to stop the alarm

Optional: let FlashBang bring the flashcard back on screen if you switch apps while the alarm is ringing. Without this, the alarm simply keeps ringing until you answer. You can change this anytime in Settings.
Without notifications, you won\'t get a shortcut back to a ringing alarm — but the alarm will still ring and show over your lock screen.
